description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Flatpak that triggers on push events with tags matching v*. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job with a privileged container running kde-5.15-21.08. Check out the repository, build a Flatpak package using the bilelmoussaoui/flatpak-github-actions/flatpak-builder action with specified manifest and architecture, and release the package as a draft on GitHub if the workflow is triggered by a tag push.
